description: The largest island in West Lake, a concentration of historical and cultural attractions, with a serene environment.
A famous ancient Buddhist temple in China, with approximately 1700 years of history, thriving incense offerings, and magnificent architecture.
A Zen-inspired ancient temple hidden among tea plantations and bamboo forests, offering a tranquil and elegant environment suitable for meditation and relaxation.
A scenic avenue on the west side of West Lake, quieter compared to Su Causeway, ideal for leisurely strolls.

attraction_name: Hangzhou Hubin Intime in77 Area A
description: A renowned shopping center in Hangzhou, located by West Lake, featuring a wide range of brands and convenient transportation.
An important natural science museum in East China, showcasing a rich variety of exhibits.
One of the New Ten Scenes of West Lake, where nine streams converge, particularly enchanting during autumn.

Exhibiting traditional Hangzhou handicrafts and modern arts and crafts, including silk, embroidery, carving, and various other craft categories.
The foremost of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a lake causeway built under the supervision of Su Dongpo, most famous for its willow trees in spring.

attraction_name: China Academy of Art Xiangshan Campus
description: A renowned art academy with unique architectural design, ideal for art enthusiasts to visit.

description: A modern pedestrian street built on the ruins of the Southern Song Dynasty imperial city, blending historical culture with contemporary commerce.

attraction_name: West Lake Longjing Shifeng Mountain Tea Roasting Center
description: A traditional tea plantation and tea-making experience site located in Longjing Village, offering views of tea fields and authentic West Lake Longjing tea tasting.

attraction_name: Autumn Moon over the Calm Lake Scenic Spot
description: One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a serene and picturesque spot for moon viewing and lake scenery.
